summary: Most requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-4 backend functions appear present in main.mo, REQ-5 AdminAuthContext is updated, REQ-6 AdminLoginPage is updated, REQ-7 Header is updated. However, REQ-1 (HomePage.tsx modification) is not directly evidenced — no HomePage.tsx appears in the diff. REQ-2 is similarly unverifiable without HomePage.tsx changes. The backend stable storage for adminPrincipal uses a var field with migration support via migration.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the Quick Access cards (User Panel / Admin Panel) from the homepage (HomePage.tsx).
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to HomePage.tsx appear in the diff. The file is not listed as added or modified. There is no evidence the Quick Access cards were removed from the homepage.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure no admin-facing elements appear on the homepage (/).
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage.tsx is not in the diff, so it cannot be confirmed that admin-facing elements were removed or that the homepage is clean of admin shortcuts.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration.mo module was added to handle canister upgrade state migration, including adding adminPrincipal to the actor state shape.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not mention or request a separate migration module. It only required stable storage for the admin principal. A standalone migration.mo file was not explicitly requested.
